title: RTSACC fanout rerun retry 1505
scope: Read-only long parallel scan for Ready-to-Sell accuracy expansion. DB write disabled. Production acceptance disabled. Requeued with a fresh id because .last-task-id and heartbeat indicate the previous current task was not picked up.
self_correction_rules: If one scan lane stalls, continue remaining lanes and write partial results.
If a root path is missing, classify it as missing and continue other roots.
If file scanning is slow, keep writing progress cycles so next continuation can distinguish slow scan from hang.
Never write to DB, never deploy, never print secrets.
